# Model Context Protocol (MCP) Builder Skill

This skill provides automation for scaffolding, validating, and managing MCP-compliant server projects in Rust, Python, and TypeScript.

## Usage

- See SKILL.md for overview and example commands.
- Use scripts in `scripts/` to scaffold and validate projects.
- Use templates in `templates/` for starter code.

## Maintainers

- anthropics/skills
